cards.title: Chest Pain & Headache DDx
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Chest pain: ACS vs PE vs Aortic dissection vs GERD vs MSK
  • Headache: Tension vs Migraine vs Cluster vs SAH (thunderclap)
  • Red flags in chest pain (RSVP: Rest, Severity, Variation, Provocation)
  • Migraine criteria: POUND mnemonic

cards.title: Abdominal & Skin DDx
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • RUQ pain: Cholecystitis, hepatitis, Fitz-Hugh-Curtis
  • LLQ pain: Diverticulitis, ectopic, ovarian cyst
  • Skin rash DDx: Symmetry, distribution, lesion type
  • Itching without rash: Cholestasis, CKD, lymphoma

cards.title: Fatigue & General DDx
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Fatigue: Anaemia, thyroid, depression, sleep apnea, malignancy
  • Weight loss DDx: MALT (Malignancy, Anxiety, Liver, TB/thyrotoxicosis)
  • Peripheral oedema: Cardiac, hepatic, renal, lymphatic, venous
  • Polyuria DDx: DM, DI, CKD, hypercalcaemia
